title: [CoreToFSM] Optimise `guard` region logic duplicated in `action` region
skipped_reason: no SV content - this is an MLIR/compiler optimization issue in CIRCT's CoreToFSM pass. The Verilog code examples are correct SystemVerilog; the bug is in how CIRCT transforms guard+action FSM transitions, duplicating guard checks via muxes in action regions. No buggy SV syntax or constructs are involved.
